name: RegionContainment
summary: Defines enumerated values for closed curve/closed curve relationships.

enum_values.name: Disjoint
enum_values.summary: There is no common area between the two regions.

enum_values.name: MutualIntersection
enum_values.summary: The two curves intersect. There is therefore no full containment relationship either way.

enum_values.name: AInsideB
enum_values.summary: Region bounded by curveA (first curve) is inside of curveB (second curve).

enum_values.name: BInsideA
enum_values.summary: Region bounded by curveB (second curve) is inside of curveA (first curve).
